creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 170300
svn patch to fix issue with sysutils/slurm-wlm

portlint: OK
testport: OK  (poudriere: 9.3-RELEASE-p36,  i386, default options / all on) [1]
testport: OK (poudriere: 9.3-RELEASE-p30,  amd64, default options / all on) [2]
testport: OK (poudriere: 10.1-RELEASE-p17, i386,  default options / all on) [3]
testport: OK (poudriere: 10.1-RELEASE-p17, amd64, default options / all on) [4]

Slurm will try to install different components based on various installed libraries.  This patch fixes issues where some files are unexpectedly installed (detected by pi@).
